hero.title: We build the software behind growing businesses.
hero.lede: Zareen is a two-person engineering studio — web applications, backend systems, and applied AI, designed and shipped end to end. Currently taking on projects through Upwork.

about.text: We're computer science graduates who started Zareen to work on real software instead of side projects. Right now that means client work on Upwork — web apps, backend systems, and the occasional AI feature. As the studio grows, we're building toward an office, a small team, and products of our own.

services.title: Web Applications
services.description: Product-grade front ends and dashboards — React, TypeScript, accessible by default.

services.title: Backend & APIs
services.description: Services and integrations built to handle real traffic, not just a demo.

services.title: Databases & Systems
services.description: Schema design, migrations, and data pipelines that stay correct as they grow.

services.title: Applied AI
services.description: LLM features, automation, and ML integrations scoped to an actual business need.

team.name: Ahmad Fahim Anwari
team.bio: Builds backend systems, APIs, AI-powered applications, and scalable software with a focus on reliability and clean architecture.With a strong background in computer networks and infrastructure

team.name: Whahid Ahmad Nadeem
team.bio: Focused on modern frontend development, UI implementation, and building responsive web applications.

projects.title: Task Maager
projects.description: Full-stack task management system with real-time team collaboration, role-based access control, and project-based chat. Built for organizations to manage projects, sections, tasks, file attachments, and audit logs

projects.title: TechHub
projects.description: A full-stack freelancing platform built for Afghanistan's tech professionals — featuring milestone-based contracts, real-time chat, KYC identity verification, AI-powered proposal writing, and a built-in code review assistant.
